name: ESP32_Host_MIDI
description: MIDI hub for ESP32: USB Host, BLE, Apple MIDI/WiFi, OSC, Ethernet, UART/DIN-5, and ESP-NOW. All transports share a single event queue and a unified send API; read the queue and resend to bridge one transport to another. Chord detection, active note tracking, PSRAM history, and SysEx queue. Supports ESP32-S3, S2, P4, and classic ESP32.
keywords: midi, usb-host, ble, rtp-midi, apple-midi, osc, ump, esp32
